message:
feat(cpu_pressure): Cx-first run_with_cx entry point (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Adds CpuPressureMonitor::run_with_cx behind the asupersync-runtime
feature, extending the Cx-first migration pattern already landed for
EventWaiter::wait_with_cx (event_stream.rs), NativeEventListener
(native_events.rs), SnapshotEngine::shutdown_checkpoint_with_cx,
WorkflowRunner, SearchBridge, CautClient, SurvivalModel, MuxWatchdog,
RestoreProcess, TelemetryCollector, Tailer, IPC primitives, and the
wait_for predicate loop.

Scope:

1. crates/frankenterm-core/src/cpu_pressure.rs (+116, additions only)

   Adds `CpuPressureMonitor::run_with_cx(cx: &Cx, shutdown)`. Behavior:

     * Pre-flight cancellation gate. If `cx.is_cancel_requested()` is
       true on entry, returns immediately without taking a sample. An
       operator who has already abandoned the pressure monitor should
       not record a spurious sample.

     * Each inter-sample sleep bound via
       `crate::runtime_compat::sleep_with_cx`, so budget-driven
       cancellation from the outer scope cuts the sleep
       deterministically under LabRuntime virtual time. If the
       sleep returns Err (cancellation), the loop terminates cleanly
       without a spurious extra sample.

     * Both `shutdown` flag and `cx.is_cancel_requested()` checked
       each iteration so either cancellation path terminates the loop
       at the next iteration gate.

   The legacy `run` is preserved intact; this commit is strictly
   additive.

   Two new LabRuntime tests under `labruntime_cpu_pressure`:

     * `run_with_cx_pre_cancelled_exits_without_sampling` (seed
       0xCF01_1CE1): pre-cancels the Cx before run_with_cx enters the
       loop; asserts zero samples taken and shutdown flag untouched.
       A Cx-unaware loop would sleep on the first interval and
       step-explode LabRuntime's max_steps budget.

     * `run_with_cx_takes_first_sample_then_honors_shutdown` (seed
       0xCF02_1CE2): shutdown flag set before entry; asserts zero
       samples taken (the shutdown check runs before sample() on the
       first tick), pinning the shared shutdown/Cx termination
       contract.

Verification (CC=llvm clang, CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ft-rusticmaple-target):

  * cargo test -p frankenterm-core --lib cpu_pressure::: 38/38 pass
    (36 existing + 2 new LabRuntime)
  * cargo clippy -p frankenterm-core --lib -D warnings: clean
  * rustfmt --check: clean

Leaves ft-xbnl0.2.3 still in_progress — additional monitoring/sampling
loops elsewhere in the tree may still benefit from the same pattern.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
